posts.hook: POV: You're standing in the actual Great Hall and your childhood just punched you in the face
slides: POV: You're standing in the actual Great Hall and your childhood just punched you in the face
The floating candles above your head are REAL. The sorting hat is RIGHT THERE.
Walk through Diagon Alley. Touch Hagrid's actual coat. Hold a real wand.
Your friends are already planning their Hogwarts houses for the group photo
Tickets selling fast. Don't watch everyone else's stories while you're stuck at home.
posts.caption:
That moment when you realize you're actually INSIDE the world that shaped your entire childhood.

No screens. No filters. Just you and the magic that made you believe in impossible things.

Your 11-year-old self is screaming.

Get tickets before they're gone 👆
posts.visual_direction: Slide 1: Person's face in awe looking up at Great Hall candles. Slide 2: Close-up of floating candles with golden light. Slide 3: Hands reaching toward authentic props. Slide 4: Group of friends in robes taking selfies. Slide 5: Ticket counter showing limited availability

posts.hook: Your muggle friends won't understand why you're crying over a piece of fabric
slides: Your muggle friends won't understand why you're crying over a piece of fabric
But this isn't just fabric. It's Hermione's actual Yule Ball dress.
The same threads that Emma Watson wore. The same magic you felt at 13.
Every stitch holds a memory. Every costume tells your story.
Book now. Some magic can't wait.
posts.caption:
They'll never understand why seeing Hermione's dress makes you sob.

But you know.

You know it's not about the dress. It's about the girl who taught you that being smart was beautiful. That friendship was everything. That you belonged somewhere.

Tickets available now 👆
posts.visual_direction: Slide 1: Person emotional looking at display case. Slide 2: Hermione's pink Yule Ball dress in pristine lighting. Slide 3: Close-up of intricate dress details. Slide 4: Multiple costume displays in dramatic lighting. Slide 5: Urgency-driven ticket booking interface

posts.hook: Everyone's posting from here and you're still scrolling
slides: Everyone's posting from here and you're still scrolling
While you're watching their stories, they're living the magic
The Forbidden Forest. Hagrid's hut. Platform 9¾. All waiting.
Your Instagram is about to be UNMATCHED
Stop scrolling. Start experiencing. Get tickets.
posts.caption:
Tired of watching everyone else live your childhood dreams?

While you're double-tapping their posts, they're walking through the Forbidden Forest.

While you're adding their stories to highlights, they're holding actual wands.

Your turn.

Tickets 👆
